title: Botany Pots Tiers
description: Adds better Botany Pots from Botany Pots
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :) This mod adds better Botany Pots from Botany Pots. **Elite:** 2x faster and 2x output
**Ultra:** 6x faster and 6x output
**Creative:** 10x faster and 10x output
